001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu;
002
003import org.bukkit.Material;
004import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
005import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
006import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008
009import java.util.Arrays;
010import java.util.HashMap;
011import java.util.Map;
012import java.util.Objects;
013
014public abstract class AbstractMenu implements Menu {
015
016    private static final ItemStack AIR = new ItemStack(Material.AIR);
017
018    protected final Map<Integer, RenderedButton> buttonMap = new HashMap<>(getRows() * 9, 1.0f);
019    protected boolean updated = false;
020
021    @Override
022    public void applyIcons(@NotNull ItemStack[] target) {
023        Arrays.fill(target, AIR);
024
025        buttonMap.values().stream()
026                .filter(Objects::nonNull)
027                .filter(button -> button.getSlot() < target.length)
028                .forEach(button -> target[button.getSlot()] = button.getIcon());
029    }
030
031    @Override
032    public void clickMenu(@NotNull Player clicker, int slot, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
033        var button = buttonMap.get(slot);
034
035        if (button == null) {
036            return;
037        }
038
039        button.clickButton(clicker, clickType);
040
041        if (button.shouldUpdate()) {
042            button.updateIcon(clicker);
043            updated = true;
044        }
045    }
046
047    @Override
048    public boolean isUpdated() {
049        var current = updated;
050        updated = false;
051        return current;
052    }
053
054    protected void addButton(@NotNull RenderedButton renderedButton) {
055        buttonMap.put(renderedButton.getSlot(), renderedButton);
056    }
057}
